# FiveServ Property Solutions
> Family-owned property maintenance. Central Florida. fiveserv.net
> Make-ready in 5 business days, guaranteed. One call. One invoice.

## Services
- Make-Ready and Unit Turns: 5-day guarantee, painting, cleaning, repairs, inspection
- Maintenance and Repairs: 24/7 emergency, plumbing, electrical, HVAC, drywall
- CapEx and Renovations: increase NOI and property value
- Residential Services: home maintenance for homeowners

## Target Client
Property management companies with 30-500 multifamily units in Central Florida

## Service Area
18 cities: Orlando, Kissimmee, Sanford, Winter Park, Lakeland, Altamonte Springs, Apopka, Ocoee, Winter Garden, Clermont, St. Cloud, Davenport, Deltona, Daytona Beach, Palm Coast, Melbourne, Palm Bay, Cocoa. Tampa Bay coming soon.

## Contact
Email: info@fiveserv.net | Phone: (407) 881-4942 | Available 24/7 | fiveserv.net

## Key Facts
- Only company in Central Florida with written 5-day make-ready guarantee
- Venezuelan-American family — 5 members — name on every job
- 300+ units completed, 50+ communities, 15+ years combined experience
